code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut max_val = 0
mut found = false
mut token = ""
let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0

while i <= n
  if i == n
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          if not found
            max_val = v
            found = true
          else if v > max_val
            max_val = v
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          if v > 0
            if not found
              max_val = v
              found = true
            else if v > max_val
              max_val = v
            end
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if found
  println("max=#{max_val}")
else
  println("none")
end
